interface.longDescription: Instant quotes for on-demand moving and delivery. Tell ChatGPT your pickup and drop-off, compare truck options with real prices, and book vetted professional movers in minutes. Furniture delivery, Marketplace pickups, storage moves, donation drop-offs, junk removal—Lugg handles it all. Same-day or scheduled, with upfront pricing. Over 1 million moves completed.
defaultPrompt: I need quote for moving apartments from Pac Heights
